sections.paragraph:
Original: רשׁם

Transliteration: resham

Phonetic: resh-am'

BDB Definition:

  1. to inscribe, sign
    1. (Peal) to inscribe, sign
    2. (Peal)
      1. to be inscribed, be written
      2. to be signed

Origin: corresponding to H7559

TWOT entry: 3002

Part(s) of speech: Verb
